\tzpentry{ID4695}{Magnetic Flux Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4695 introduces Magnetic Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align}\n\\mathbf{u}(\\mathbf{r},t) &= \\nabla\\Phi_\\text{ac} + \\nabla \\times \\mathbf{\\Psi}_\\text{ac} \\\\\n\\nabla \\cdot \\mathbf{\\Psi}_\\text{ac} &= 0 \\quad \\text{(Coulomb gauge)}\n\\end{align}
